# Clawterm

> A terminal for running many AI agents at once and keeping track of them.

Clawterm is a desktop terminal emulator built with Tauri 2 + xterm.js. It provides vertical sidebar tabs with live agent status, split panes, per-pane context tracking, desktop notifications, git worktree integration, and a project system for organizing independent workspaces.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/clawterm/clawterm/blob/main/README.md)
- [Contributing](https://github.com/clawterm/clawterm/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/clawterm/clawterm/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Release Process](https://github.com/clawterm/clawterm/blob/main/RELEASING.md)

## Key Concepts

- **Projects**: Horizontal tab bar for independent workspaces, each with own sidebar tabs
- **Split Panes**: Horizontal/vertical terminal splits with per-pane status footers
- **Agent Detection**: Automatic detection of Claude Code via process tree and OSC sequences
- **Status Line**: Claude Code context usage, cost, and model shown in per-pane footer
- **Worktrees**: Git worktree integration for running agents on isolated branches

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: TypeScript, xterm.js, CSS (no framework)
- Backend: Rust (Tauri 2)
- Build: Vite, Cargo
- CI: GitHub Actions
- Distribution: macOS (.dmg), Windows (.nsis), auto-updates via Tauri updater
